---
name: Territorial Problem
about: Report a real problem observed in the territory
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

_Describe what you observed. Be specific — where, when, how often._



## Who is affected

_Visitors, arrieros, campsite operators, rangers, local families, wildlife?_



## What exists today

_How is this handled currently? Paper, email, nothing?_



## What a solution might look like

_Optional. If you have ideas, share them. If not, that's fine too._


## How you know this

_First-hand observation? Field report? Published data? Be honest about your source._



---

_Remember: we only open issues about problems known from direct experience.
If this requires external verification, it's not ready to be an issue yet._
